auth.heading: Sign in to Steelpage
auth.intro: Use an account to comment and save documents. Reading may be open to everyone depending on configuration.
auth.local_disabled: Local sign-up is disabled. Use one of the providers below.
auth.oidc_mismatch_hint: An account already exists with that email and is linked to a different identity provider. Contact an admin to reconcile or sign in with the original method.

admin.heading: Administration
admin.settings_intro: Read-only summary of the running configuration. Edit config.yaml and restart Steelpage to change these values.
admin.git_no_remote_hint: Add a remote to the content repo (git remote add origin …) to enable sync.
admin.git_conflict_hint: A pull --rebase paused because of merge conflicts. Resolve them on the server or abort the rebase below.
admin.git_abort_confirm: Abort the in-progress rebase? Local changes that aren't committed yet will be lost.
admin.mailer_not_configured_hint: Set the email.* block in config.yaml and restart Steelpage to enable transactional email (test sends, future password resets, verification).
admin.mailer_test_to_placeholder: leave blank to send to your own account email
admin.permissions_hint: When a path matches at least one rule, only matching rules grant access (defaults stop applying). Subjects are evaluated for each user: anonymous matches everyone, authenticated matches signed-in users, role/group/user match by membership. Permissions imply lower ones (write > comment > read).
admin.test_no_rules: No rules match this path — defaults apply.
admin.disable_mfa_confirm: Disable 2FA for {name}? They'll need to re-enroll their authenticator app.

password_reset.forgot_intro: Enter the email on your account. If we find a match, we'll send a link to reset your password.
password_reset.forgot_sent_hint: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. The link expires in 60 minutes.
password_reset.reset_intro_no_token: This page needs a reset token. Open the link from your email, or request a new one.
password_reset.reset_intro: Enter a new password to finish resetting your account.
password_reset.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password_reset.reset_done_hint: You can now sign in with your new password.

preferences.heading: Preferences
preferences.font_hint: Used across the document body and most chrome. Fonts are bundled locally — Steelpage never calls out to Google Fonts.

mfa.heading: Two-factor authentication
mfa.disabled_hint: Add an authenticator app to require a 6-digit code at sign-in alongside your password.
mfa.setup_step1: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Aegis, 1Password, Google Authenticator, etc.).
mfa.setup_step2: Then enter the current 6-digit code to confirm:
mfa.disable_prompt: Enter a current 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm.
mfa.login_prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

email_verify.heading: Verify your email
email_verify.ok_hint: Thanks — your email is confirmed. You can keep editing as before.
email_verify.missing_hint: Open the link in your verification email, or request a new one from your account page.
email_verify.error_hint: The link is invalid, used, or expired. Request a new verification email from your account page.
email_verify.banner_hint: We sent a link when you signed up. Open it to confirm this email is yours.
email_verify.account_not_verified: Not verified yet. We sent a link at sign-up; if you don't see it, send a fresh one.

config.heading: Live configuration
config.intro: Edit runtime settings without restarting. Fields locked with a 🔒 icon are read from config.yaml and require a restart to change. Overrides are persisted in the DB; YAML stays the cold-start source of truth.

tree.add_help: Nested folders are implied — e.g. handbook/intro.md creates the folder.
tree.add_body_help: Leave blank for a minimal stub with a heading derived from the filename.

account.heading: Account
account.tokens_intro: Mint tokens to access Steelpage without a session — for headless agents, sharing a single page, or anything else. Tokens carry your permissions; they're shown ONCE on creation and cannot be retrieved later.
account.token_kind_share: Page share — read-only on one document
account.scope_read: read — fetch documents, search, list comments
account.scope_write: write — read + comment + save / move / copy / delete
account.scope_hint: Higher scopes imply lower ones. Token actions are also gated by your own permissions on each path.
account.share_hint: Strictly read-only on this exact path. Anyone with the token can access the document — share carefully.
account.token_validation: Provide a name and at least one scope.
account.token_revoke_confirm: Revoke {name}? Future requests with this token will fail.
account.reveal_warning: Copy this now — Steelpage won't show it again.
account.reveal_hint: Use as Authorization: Bearer <token> in your HTTP client.

file_actions.delete_warning: This commits a git rm. The file's history stays in git and you can recover it by reverting the commit on the remote. Open comments on this document are removed.

name_prompt.heading: Choose a display name
name_prompt.intro: Comments need an author. Pick a display name — you can change it later.
name_prompt.label: Display name

comments.heading: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Switch to edit mode and add one.

search.heading: Search the archive
search.placeholder: Find by title, heading, body, tag…
